featured.question: What's the real difference between a $5k and a $35k site?
featured.answer: It's not just design; it's the architecture. A $5k site is usually a template-based brochure. A $35k investment at Noctra covers: **Strategic positioning**, **custom systems** (CRM, APIs), **high-performance engineering**, and **conversion optimization** that turns visitors into revenue. One is an expense; the other is a revenue-generating asset.
featured.label: Most Asked Question

items.question: What's the real difference between a $5k and a $35k site?
items.answer:
Great question. The difference isn't "prettier." It's:

**CONVERSION:**
• $5k site: Generic template, converts ~1-2% of visitors
• $35k site: Strategic design, converts ~3-5% (40% more clients with same traffic)

**SPEED:**
• $5k: WordPress + 20 plugins = 4-6 second load (Google penalizes, users abandon)
• $35k: Modern architecture = <1 second load (better SEO, better experience)

**OWNERSHIP:**
• $5k: Tied to proprietary platform, migrating costs another project
• $35k: Complete code is yours, GitHub ownership, total portability

**INTEGRATION:**
• $5k: Basic form that goes to your email
• $35k: Integrated with your CRM, WhatsApp, calendars, advanced analytics

**SUPPORT:**
• $5k: "30-day support" then you pay $200/hour for changes
• $35k: 60 days of optimization included, changes based on real data

Result: $35k site pays for itself in 6-8 months with better conversion. $5k site is an expense, not an investment.

items.question: How do you guarantee the 6-month ROI you mention?
items.answer:
We don't "guarantee" it contractually (that would be irresponsible - your success depends on multiple factors outside our control like your offer, pricing, service).

What we DO:

**REAL TRACKING:**
• We set up analytics from day 1
• Monthly dashboard with: traffic, conversions, sources, behavior
• You measure real results, not promises

**DATA-DRIVEN OPTIMIZATION:**
• First 60 days we monitor performance
• If conversion < 3%, we make adjustments: CTAs, copy, flows
• We iterate until reaching industry benchmarks

**CLEAR EXPECTATIONS:**
• We tell you upfront what to expect (based on your industry + estimated traffic)
• If we project 10 leads/month and you only get 3, we investigate why
• We separate "site problem" vs "traffic/offer problem"

**SATISFACTION CLAUSE:**
• If after 60 days + optimizations the site objectively doesn't convert better than your previous situation, we negotiate a proportional refund or additional work at no cost.
• This is in the contract. It's not marketing.

Zero risk? No. Mitigated risk with a serious process? Yes.

items.question: Why not use Wix, WordPress, or an agency?
items.answer:
They're all valid options. Here's an honest breakdown so you can decide:

**WIX / SQUARESPACE:**
• Fastest to launch — good for simple informational sites
• 5–10 hrs/week to learn and maintain yourself
• 2-year cost: $15k–40k MXN + IVA (subscriptions + apps + your time)
• Ceiling: limited customization, no real integrations, medium SEO

**WEBFLOW:**
• Better design control than Wix, good SEO
• Steep learning curve: 8–15 hrs/week
• 2-year cost: $20k–50k MXN + IVA (plan + plugins + learning time)
• Ceiling: needs technical knowledge, limited server-side logic

**TRADITIONAL AGENCY (WordPress):**
• High customization, large ecosystem of plugins
• WordPress = 40% of all websites = hacker target #1, requires monthly maintenance
• Load speed: 3–8 seconds average with plugins (Google penalizes, users abandon)
• 2-year cost: $80k–200k MXN + IVA (project + maintenance + hosting + plugins)

**NOCTRA:**
• Custom Next.js engineering — <1 second load, no plugins, no vulnerabilities
• You don't manage anything: 1 monthly call of 30 min is all we ask
• 2-year cost: from $20k MXN + IVA project + optional support
• Code is yours (GitHub), no vendor lock-in

**When we DO recommend WordPress:** Multiple editors needing a full CMS, specific plugin requirements, or very tight budgets where time-to-launch matters more than performance.

For growing businesses that want a site that works as a conversion asset — not a maintenance burden — we build custom.

items.question: What happens if my site needs changes after launch?
items.answer:
Depends on the type of change and when you request it:

**FIRST 60 DAYS (POST-LAUNCH):**
• Up to 2 rounds of adjustments INCLUDED
• This covers: CTAs that don't convert, copy that needs improvement, sections that confuse users
• Doesn't cover: new features outside original scope, complete design overhaul

**AFTER 60 DAYS:**
• Minor changes (text, images, style tweaks): $500-1500 + IVA per package
• New features (additional form, new page, integration): $3k-8k + IVA depending on complexity
• Partial redesign (new home page): $8k-15k + IVA
• Complete redesign: essentially a new project

**BUT HERE'S THE SECRET:**
We deliver all code on GitHub with complete ownership. If after 60 days you prefer another developer to make changes, you can. No vendor lock-in.

Most clients come back to us because:
1. We know the project inside out
2. Our rate is competitive ($1500-2000/day + IVA vs $2500-3500 from other agencies)
3. We maintain clean architecture (other developers can work with our code)

**ALTERNATIVE: MONTHLY RETAINER**
If you expect frequent changes: $5k/month + IVA = 3 working days per month. Unused days accumulate up to 2 months.

items.question: Do you work with companies outside Querétaro/Mexico?
items.answer:
Yes, but with considerations:

**MEXICO (ANY STATE):**
• No problem. Everything is remote.
• We prefer clients in similar time zones (easier communication)
• We invoice normally with Mexican RFC

**INTERNATIONAL (USA, LATAM, EUROPE):**
• Technically we can, but:
• Time zone: If you're US East Coast, we can. If you're Australia, complicated.
• Payments: We prefer international transfer or Wise (not PayPal)
• Invoicing: We can invoice in USD but as a Mexican entity
• Legal: Contract under Mexican law (if this is a problem, we're probably not a fit)

**WHY ARE WE SELECTIVE WITH INTERNATIONAL?**
Noctra is a boutique studio, not a massive agency. International clients sometimes:
• Expect 24/7 service (we're not that)
• Need midnight calls due to time zones (not sustainable)
• Want more complex contracts (not our strength)

We prefer 10 happy local clients over 50 mediocre international ones.

That said: If you're a Mexican company with US operations, perfect. If you're a Latin startup with a distributed team, we can work. Schedule a call to check fit.

items.question: I saw you use Next.js and TypeScript. Do I need to know about that?
items.answer:
No. Zero. Nothing.

That's like asking "I saw you use TIG welding for my gate. Do I need to know how to weld?"

You interact with:
• A website that works (fast, secure, modern)
• An intuitive admin panel (if you need to edit content)
• Google Analytics dashboard (if you want to see metrics)

We take care of:
• Code (TypeScript, Next.js, React, whatever's needed)
• Infrastructure (Vercel, hosting, CDN, DNS)
• Security (HTTPS, headers, rate limiting)
• Performance (asset optimization, caching)

**SO WHY DO WE MENTION IT?**
Transparency. There are technical clients (CTOs, founders with tech backgrounds) who DO want to know what stack we use. For them, it's important to know we don't use legacy technology.

For non-technical clients: ignore the tech stack. Focus on results.

**CAN I SEE THE CODE?**
Yes. The repository is yours. If you have a CTO or in-house developer, they can audit it.

**WHAT IF I WANT TO SWITCH TO ANOTHER DEVELOPER?**
You can. The code is portable. It's not a proprietary system. Any competent Next.js developer can continue the work (though obviously we'd prefer you come back to us).

Process.title: Our process
Process.subtitle: Clear steps so you always know what's happening with your project.

0.title: Diagnosis & Discovery
0.subtitle: Deliverable: Project Roadmap
0.description: We don't start designing until we understand your business. This phase produces a strategic document that guides the entire project.
deliverables: Target audience and user personas definition

1.title: Design & Prototyping
1.subtitle: Deliverable: Interactive Figma Preview
1.description: Before writing code, we design the full experience. You'll see exactly how your site will look and function.
1.your_involvement: Weekly review (30 min), up to 2 rounds of changes included

2.title: Development & Construction
2.subtitle: Deliverable: Live Preview Staging Site
2.description: We turn the design into code. Day 1 access to your staging site so you see progress in real-time.
deliverables: CMS integration (if applicable) for content editing

3.title: Launch & Delivery
3.subtitle: Deliverable: Live Site + Full Codebase
3.description: We don't just launch your site. We deliver everything: code, documentation, accesses. It's 100% yours.
deliverables: Full GitHub repository (ownership transferred to you)
Technical documentation (how to update, what's where)
Content guide (how to add pages, edit text)

4.title: Continuous Optimization (60 days)
4.subtitle: Deliverable: Monthly Optimization Report
4.description: You focus on your profession. We focus on your digital growth. One 30-minute call per month is all we need from you — everything else is on us.
deliverables: Up to 2 rounds of adjustments based on real data
A/B testing for CTAs or key sections (if traffic allows)

ServicesPage.title: What We Build
ServicesPage.subtitle: Every service is designed to generate real results for your business.

web_dev.title: Professional Websites
web_dev.problem: Your current website is slow, outdated, or simply not bringing in clients.
web_dev.solution: We build fast, modern websites designed to convert visitors into customers.
web_dev.focus: Your website is your hardest-working salesperson. We make sure it looks professional, loads instantly, and guides visitors toward contacting you or buying.
web_dev.why: A fast, professional website builds trust and keeps visitors from leaving.
process: Direct analysis of your current site and competitors
Design the structure and look of your new site
Build and test every page and feature
deliverables: Your site live and hosted globally
deliverables_subtext: Your website loads instantly for visitors anywhere in the world.
Switch providers anytime, zero vendor lock-in.
More organic traffic = fewer paid ads needed.

ecommerce.title: Online Stores
ecommerce.focus: Your window to the global market. We create shopping experiences that eliminate friction and turn visits into recurring revenue.
ecommerce.why: An optimized e-commerce is the difference between having a catalog and having a scalable business.
ecommerce.problem: You try to sell through Instagram or with a site that doesn't build trust or facilitate payment.
ecommerce.solution: Robust platforms with integrated payments, inventory management, and sales-oriented design.
process: We analyze your products and logistics
We design the ideal shopping flow
deliverables_subtext: Ready to receive card and bank transfer payments.
Update prices & inventory yourself in seconds.
Understand exactly where your sales come from.

ai.title: Custom Systems
ai.problem: Repetitive tasks and manual processes are eating your team's time.
ai.solution: We build custom tools and automations that do the work for you.
ai.focus: We build smart systems that handle repetitive work automatically—from answering customer questions to managing appointments and sending follow-ups.
ai.why: Automation saves hours every week and eliminates human errors.
process: Build and train your custom tools
Test and launch with your team
deliverables_subtext: Automated customer support or data processing 24/7.
Visual metrics to make data-driven decisions.
Clear docs so your team is fully independent.

seo.title: SEO & Growth
seo.focus: Strategies for your site to appear on Google, attract qualified traffic, and convert more visitors into customers.
seo.why: If you don't appear on Google, you don't exist for your potential customers.
seo.problem: Your site doesn't appear in relevant searches and you're losing customers to the competition.
seo.solution: We optimize your site to rank on Google and convert traffic into measurable results.
process: SEO audit of your current site
deliverables_subtext: Speed, structure, and optimized structured data.
Content plan based on real searches from your customers.
You know exactly how your positioning is advancing.

ongoing.title: Ongoing Digital Management
ongoing.focus: Your business doesn't stop, neither should your technology. Strategic partnership plans to ensure you never stop growing.
ongoing.why: We don't sell maintenance. We sell peace of mind and constant evolution for your most valuable digital asset.
ongoing.problem: Your site falls behind, plugins fail, or you simply don't have time to manage the technical part.
ongoing.solution: We handle the hosting, security, and improvements. You receive metrics and a monthly evolution strategy.
process: Transfer of hosting and domain to Noctra
deliverables_subtext: Your site hosted on world-class infrastructure.
If your site goes down, we know before you do and fix it.
Total transparency on what we are improving.

comparison.subtitle: Choose the right solution for your business
comparison.footer_text: Not sure which is right for you?

items.question: What's included in the price?
items.answer: Everything. Setup, development, testing, launch, documentation, training, and 60-90 days of support. No hidden fees.

items.question: Can I upgrade from Professional to E-Commerce later?
items.answer: Yes. We build with scalability in mind. Upgrading typically costs the difference between tiers plus integration work.

items.question: Do you work with businesses outside Mexico?
items.answer: Yes. We've worked with clients in USA, Canada, and Europe. All communication in English or Spanish.

items.question: What happens after the 60-day support period?
items.answer: You own the code and can manage it yourself, hire us for ongoing support ($X/month), or work with any developer.

items.question: How do payments work?
items.answer: 50% upfront to begin, 50% at launch. We accept bank transfer or credit card. Payment plans available for Custom Systems.

items.question: How much does a project cost?
items.answer: From $20,000 MXN for basic sites up to $120,000+ MXN for custom systems. 70% of clients are in the $35k-$65k range. During the consultation, we'll give you an exact quote.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: 4-6 weeks for standard sites. Custom systems 8-12 weeks. Exact timeline in the proposal.

items.question: What do I need to have ready?
items.answer: Minimum: Clarity on business objective, brand assets (if you have them), and 1-2 hours per week for feedback. We handle everything else.

items.question: What happens if I'm not satisfied?
items.answer: Measurable results guarantee. If we don't meet KPIs in 60 days, proportional refund. <link>See full guarantee</link>

items.question: Do you work outside of Querétaro?
items.answer: Yes. 100% remote. Video calls, online staging, communication via WhatsApp.

items.question: Can I see examples of your work?
items.answer: Absolutely. We have 2 projects currently in development (Woodax Design and Dyma Group, shown above). Full case studies with metrics will be available when these projects launch in Q1 2025. Want to be next? Schedule a call to see detailed previews.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the website of Noctra Studio ("we," "us," or "our"), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website or services. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service.

services.title: 2. Services Description
services.content: Noctra Studio provides digital design, development, and strategic consulting services. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of our services at any time without prior notice. We are not liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuation of the service.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The content, features, and functionality of this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, and software, are the exclusive property of Noctra Studio and are protected by international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property or proprietary rights laws.

obligations.title: 4. User Obligations
obligations.content: You agree not to use the website for any unlawful purpose or in any way that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair the site. You further agree not to attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the website, other accounts, computer systems, or networks connected to the website.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall Noctra Studio, its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Service.

governing.title: 6. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governing.content: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Mexico, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any dispute arising from these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Mexico City, Mexico.

contact.title: 7. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Noctra Studio ("we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, in compliance with the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP) in Mexico and international standards.

collection.title: 2. Information We Collect
collection.content: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you contact us or use our services. This includes:

list.contact: Contact Data: Email address, phone number.
list.project: Project Data: Details about your project needs, budget, and timeline.
list.technical: Technical Data: IP address, browser type, and usage data collected via cookies.

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
purpose.content: We use your personal data for the following purposes:

list.service: To provide and maintain our services.
list.communication: To communicate with you regarding your inquiries.
list.improvement: To improve our website and user experience.

rights.title: 4. Data Protection Rights (ARCO Rights)
rights.content: In accordance with the LFPDPPP, you have the right to Access, Rectify, Cancel, or Oppose (ARCO) the processing of your personal data.

list.access: Access: You have the right to know what personal data we hold about you.
list.rectification: Rectification: You have the right to request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
list.cancellation: Cancellation: You have the right to request the deletion of your data when it is no longer necessary.
list.opposition: Opposition: You have the right to oppose the processing of your data for specific purposes.

rights.contact_text: To exercise these rights, please contact us at

cookies.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our service and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

changes.title: 6. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date.

contact.title: 7. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

footer.title: Questions about this policy?
footer.subtitle: We're here to help clarify any doubts regarding your data or our terms.

TechnologyPage.title: Why Next.js (Explained Without Jargon)
TechnologyPage.subtitle: We chose the best technology for your business results. Here's why, in plain language.
TechnologyPage.analogy: WordPress is like renting a furnished apartment — it works, but you can't change the walls, and the landlord can raise the rent. Next.js is like building your own house — you own everything, customize anything, and it appreciates in value over time.
TechnologyPage.comparison_title: WordPress vs Next.js: What matters for your business

comparison.business_impact: Every second of delay costs you 7% in conversions

comparison.wordpress: Constant plugin updates, security patches, compatibility issues
comparison.nextjs: Everything integrated, nothing to update manually

comparison.wordpress: Slow sites get penalized by Google
comparison.nextjs: Built-in SEO optimization, Google loves fast sites
comparison.business_impact: Higher rankings = more organic traffic = more clients

comparison.nextjs: No plugins to hack, modern security practices
comparison.business_impact: Protect your business and customer data

comparison.wordpress: Locked into specific hosting and plugin ecosystem
comparison.nextjs: You own 100% of the code, take it anywhere

TechnologyPage.cost_note: Next.js costs more upfront but saves money long-term — and performs significantly better.
TechnologyPage.cta: See if Next.js is right for your business

FirstClientsPage.title: First Clients Program
FirstClientsPage.subtitle: We're building our track record. You get exceptional value. We get a case study. We both win.

benefits.title: 25% discount on your project
benefits.detail: A $20,000 MXN website becomes $15,000 MXN. A $35,000 MXN e-commerce becomes $26,250 MXN.

benefits.title: 12 months priority support
benefits.detail: Response time under 4 hours. Bug fixes within 24 hours. You jump the queue.

benefits.title: Portfolio feature (optional)
benefits.detail: Your project becomes a case study on our site. Great for your credibility too.

benefits.title: Free access to new features
benefits.detail: Any new tools or integrations we develop in the next year — you get them first, free.

FirstClientsPage.why_text: Every great agency started with zero clients. We're offering exceptional value in exchange for the opportunity to prove ourselves. You get senior-level development at a fraction of the cost. We get real-world projects to showcase.
process_steps: We discuss your project and confirm it's a good fit
You receive a detailed proposal with the 25% discount applied
If you like it, we start within 2 weeks
FirstClientsPage.cta_subtitle: No commitment. Let's just talk about your project.

hero.headline: Build great projects without the full-time commitment

how_it_works.title: How collaboration works
how_it_works.intro: This is NOT employment. This is project-based collaboration with clear terms and fair compensation.

steps.title: You apply with portfolio
steps.description: Show us your best work. We look for quality over quantity, specialization over generalization.

steps.title: We evaluate fit
steps.description: 30-minute conversation to understand your expertise, availability, and working style. We're looking for professionals who value clarity and meet deadlines.

steps.title: You join the network
steps.description: You're added to our curated list. No exclusivity required - you can work with other clients. We reach out when a project matches your skills.

steps.title: Project opportunity
steps.description: We send project brief with scope, timeline, and compensation. You decide if you want to take it. No obligation.

steps.title: Collaboration begins
steps.description: Clear brief, defined deliverables, agreed timeline. We handle client communication, you focus on execution. Payment upon milestone completion.

roles.title: Specializations we collaborate with
roles.intro: We don't need generalists. We need specialists who are the best at what they do.

what_you_do: Create brand identities for Noctra Studio clients
Design logos, color palettes, typographic systems

benefits.title: What you get as a network member

items.title: Fair, transparent pricing
items.description: We share compensation ranges upfront. No surprises, no negotiations on every project. You know what you'll earn before accepting.

items.title: Quality clients, not quantity
items.description: We pre-qualify all clients. They have budget, clear goals, and respect for professional work. No tire-kickers or endless revisions.

items.title: Clear briefs, defined scope
items.description: Every project comes with detailed brief, examples, deliverable specifications, and timeline. No vague 'make it pop' requests.

items.title: We handle client management
items.description: You don't deal with scope creep, payment collection, or endless back-and-forth. We're the buffer between you and the client.

items.title: Payment on delivery
items.description: You deliver the agreed milestone, you get paid within 3 business days. Bank transfer, no payment platform fees deducted from your rate.

items.title: Portfolio-worthy projects
items.description: We work on projects we're proud of, with clients who value quality. Every project can go in your portfolio (with client permission).

items.title: No exclusivity required
items.description: Work with other agencies, take your own clients, collaborate elsewhere. We only ask that you meet deadlines for projects you accept from us.

items.title: Right to decline
items.description: Every project is optional. Busy? Not interested? Just say no. It doesn't affect future opportunities.

expectations.title: What we expect from you
expectations.intro: This is a professional collaboration. We're clear about expectations upfront.

items.title: Meet deadlines or communicate early
items.description: Life happens, we understand. But if you can't meet a deadline, tell us ASAP so we can adjust. Last-minute surprises damage client trust.

items.title: Quality over speed
items.description: We'd rather you take an extra day and deliver excellent work than rush mediocre work. We build our reputation on quality.

items.title: Two rounds of revisions included
items.description: Pricing assumes two revision rounds. If client requests exceed this (rare, because we manage scope), we renegotiate compensation.

items.title: Professional communication
items.description: Respond to messages within 24 hours on business days. Use clear language. Ask questions when brief is unclear. We value over-communication.

items.title: Work files included
items.description: Deliver final files plus source files (Figma, AI, PSD, etc.). Client owns everything they paid for. This is non-negotiable.

pricing_model.title: How pricing works
pricing_model.intro: We believe in transparent and predictable compensation. This is how we structure collaboration:
pricing_model.subtext: No hidden commissions. No project-by-project negotiations. Pricing is defined at the start and doesn't change.

your_share.for: Logo design, palette, typography, brand guide

noctra_share.for: Client prospecting, commercial proposal, project coordination, quality review, revision management, collection and billing

comparison.title: Comparison with alternatives
comparison.intro: Your compensation depends on context. Here's the real landscape:

rows.time: 20h execution + 10h prospecting + 5h proposals + 3h negotiation + 2h collection = 40h total

comparison.closing_note: 💡 The best model depends on your situation. If you already have a constant flow of own clients who pay well and fast, keep that situation. Noctra is to complement or replace Upwork/Fiverr, not to replace your best direct clients.

terms.title: Payment terms
list: You deliver milestone → We review (24-48 hours) → We pay (within 3 business days)
You invoice as freelancer (if you have RFC) or we can use honorarios receipt

application.title: Apply to join the network
application.intro: We review applications on a rolling basis. Even if we don't have immediate projects in your specialty, we keep strong portfolios on file.

fields.name: Full name
fields.location_note: Remote work is fine, but we prefer Mexico-based talent for timezone alignment
fields.portfolio_note: Behance, personal site, Dribbble, or PDF - whatever shows your best work
fields.best_work: Link to your single best project (with context)
fields.best_work_placeholder: Paste link and briefly explain: What was the challenge? What did you create? What was the result?
fields.rate_expectation: Rate expectation for typical project in your specialty
fields.rate_note: Be realistic. We'll discuss specifics if there's a fit, but we need to know if expectations align.
fields.why_interested: Why are you interested in joining this network?
fields.why_placeholder: What appeals to you about project-based collaboration vs traditional employment or solo freelancing?

section_1.title: WHAT'S NEXT:
steps: 1. We'll review your portfolio in 3-5 business days
2. If there's a fit, we'll reach out for a 30-minute call

section_2.content: If we don't contact you within 5 days, it means we don't have immediate projects in your area, but we'll keep your application on file for future consideration (typically 3-6 months).

actions.text: → Follow us on X/Twitter for projects and opportunities:

closing.content: THIS IS NOT A PERMANENT REJECTION. Our needs change every quarter.

items.a: Freelance/contractor relationship. You remain independent, invoice per project, can work with other clients. This is NOT employment - no benefits, no exclusivity, no fixed hours.

items.q: How often will I get projects?
items.a: Depends on your specialty and our client pipeline. Could be 1 project per month, could be 1 every 3 months. We can't guarantee volume - treat this as supplementary income, not your sole source.

items.q: What if I disagree with client feedback?
items.a: We discuss it together. If feedback is unreasonable or outside scope, we push back on your behalf. If it's a legitimate request within scope, we expect you to accommodate. We're the buffer between you and the client.

items.q: Can I use projects in my portfolio?
items.a: Yes, with client permission (which we usually get). We include portfolio rights in our client contracts specifically so you can showcase your work.

items.q: What happens if I miss a deadline?
items.a: First time with valid reason: We work it out. Repeated issues or no-shows: We stop sending projects. Our reputation with clients depends on reliability, so we need that from collaborators.

items.q: Do I need to be in Querétaro?
items.a: No. Remote collaboration works fine. We prefer Mexico-based (timezone + local understanding), but location isn't a dealbreaker if portfolio is strong.

items.q: What if I want to stop collaborating?
items.a: Just tell us. No contracts, no penalties. Finish any active projects you've committed to, then you're free to go. We'd appreciate honest feedback about why, but it's not required.

compensation_items.q: Why only 40% if I do the work?
compensation_items.a:
We also do work, just different:

→ Before the project: We prospect, make commercial proposals, close sales (10-15 hours per closed project)
→ During the project: We coordinate client communication, handle scope changes, perform QA
→ After the project: We collect payments, invoice, handle guarantees

The 60% we retain covers all that + the risk (we guarantee client refunds if they aren't satisfied, even if we've already paid you).

Think of it this way: Would you rather earn $30k by investing 40 hours (20h execution + 20h admin), or earn $12k by investing only 20 hours and using the other 20h on another project?

compensation_items.q: How do I compare to Fiverr or Upwork?
compensation_items.a:
FIVERR:
→ Client pays $1,000 USD
→ Fiverr takes 20% = $200
→ You receive $800
→ But... you invested 15h in proposals you didn't win
→ Real effective rate: much lower

UPWORK:
→ Similar to Fiverr
→ Plus: competition with $5/hour freelancers
→ Race to the bottom in price

NOCTRA STUDIO:
→ Client pays $30,000 MXN
→ Noctra takes 60% = $18,000 (but brings you the pre-qualified client)
→ You receive 40% = $12,000
→ You invest 0h in prospecting
→ Guaranteed payment in 3 days

compensation_items.q: Can I negotiate a higher percentage?
compensation_items.a:
In exceptional projects where your involvement is 80%+ of the work (e.g., a complex SaaS dashboard where the designer does almost everything), we can discuss custom splits.

For standard projects, we maintain 40/60 for simplicity and transparency.

compensation_items.q: What if I bring my own client to Noctra?
compensation_items.a:
If you bring the client and only need coordination/QA support from Noctra, we can discuss a different split (e.g., 70/30 for you).

Schedule a call to discuss these cases.

Bank transfer (SPEI), with no platform fees deducted from your rate. You invoice as a freelancer (if you have RFC) or we can use honorarios receipts.

Milestone delivery → We review in 24-48h → We pay you in 3 business days.

compensation_items.q: What if the client cancels the project midway?
compensation_items.a:
If you already completed work before the cancellation, we pay you proportionally for delivered milestones. This is in our client contracts.

Example: $30k project cancelled after 50% delivery → We pay you $6k (50% of your $12k total).

legal.contractor_status: All collaborators work as independent contractors. Noctra Studio does not withhold taxes, provide benefits, or establish employer-employee relationships. You are responsible for your own tax obligations.
legal.ip_ownership: All work created under Noctra Studio projects becomes property of the client. You retain the right to display work in your portfolio (with client permission) but cannot resell or reuse client work.

OngoingManagement.subtitle: Your business doesn't stop, neither should your technology. Strategic partnership plans to ensure you never stop growing.
